name: Cereal Oat Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 8 minutes
Mix flour and baking soda in a small bowl. Beat margarine in a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until softened. Gradually add sugars, beating until light and fluffy. Add egg and vanilla, beating well. Gradually add the flour mixture, beating well after each addition. Stir in oats, raisins, and cereal (post Grape-Nuts). Drop by rounded tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 8 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool for 1 minute; remove from cookie sheets. Cool completely on wire racks. Makes 5 dozen.
